title: ononis spinosa subsp. spinosiformis
intro: Ononis spinosa subsp. spinosiformis, also known as the spiny restharrow, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ononis spinosa subsp. spinosiformis include treating urinary tract infections, reducing swelling and pain, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
